cust_desc.description: Customer Description (string, max 64 chars)  -  Human-readable device description

cust_f2.description: Customer Field 2 (string, max 64 chars)  -  Reserved customer field 2

cust_f3.description: Customer Field 3 (string, max 64 chars)  -  Reserved customer field 3

cust_f4.description: Customer Field 4 (string, max 64 chars)  -  Reserved customer field 4

gnss_acc.description: GNSS Accuracy Threshold (int, metres)  -  Minimum acceptable horizontal accuracy; default 3 m

gnss_con.description: GNSS Constellation Mask (uint8 hex)  -  Active GNSS constellation bitmask sent to u-blox via UBX CFG-VALSET. Click to edit.

gnss_rt.description: GNSS Update Rate (int, seconds)  -  Position fix update interval; default 1 s

gnss_ver.description: GNSS Version (string, max 32 chars)  -  Receiver chip/firmware version string (e.g. u-blox8)

gps_fmt.description: GPS Format  -  GPS string format in telemetry; default NMEA

hw_info.description: Hardware Info (string: sn,hw_ver,fw_ver)  -  Device serial number, hardware revision, and firmware version

led_brightness.description: LED Brightness (int, 0-100)  -  Charge status LED brightness; default 100

lte_bnd.description: LTE Band Mask (binary string, max 85 chars)  -  Active LTE-M/NB-IoT bands as a binary bit-string; LSB (rightmost) = Band 1, leading zeros omitted.

mdm_imei.description: Modem IMEI (string, max 20 chars)  -  IMEI number; if blank, refreshed via AT commands on boot

mdm_info.description: Modem Info (string: make,model,fw_ver)  -  Cellular modem manufacturer, model, and firmware version

misc_en.description: Misc Enable (uint8 bitmask)  -  Bit 0: charge LED, Bit 1: apply config on power-down, Bits 2-3: reserved

misc_f1.description: Misc Field 1 (string, max 64 chars)  -  Reserved string field 1

misc_f2.description: Misc Field 2 (string, max 64 chars)  -  Reserved string field 2

misc_rsv.description: Misc Reserved (string, max 64 chars)  -  Reserved for future use

mq_addr.description: MQTT Broker Address (string, max 64 chars)  -  Broker hostname or IP address

mq_clid.description: MQTT Client ID (string, max 64 chars)  -  Unique MQTT client identifier

mq_pass.description: MQTT Password (string, max 64 chars)  -  Password for broker authentication

mq_port.description: MQTT Broker Port (int)  -  TCP port; 1883 for plain, 8883 for TLS

mq_qos.description: MQTT QoS (int: 0, 1, or 2)  -  Default publish Quality of Service level

mq_rt.description: MQTT Poll Rate (int, ms)  -  Receive poll interval in milliseconds

mq_tls.description: MQTT TLS (bool 0/1)  -  Enable TLS encryption for broker connection

mq_user.description: MQTT Username (string, max 64 chars)  -  Username for broker authentication

msg_fmt.description: Message Format  -  Telemetry serialization format; default JSON

ntn_apn.description: NTN APN (string)  -  NTN cellular APN string

ntn_bndlk.description: NTN Band Lock (string)  -  Comma-separated NTN band list (e.g. 23,255,256)

ntn_chk_lte_tmr.description: NTN Check LTE Timer (int, seconds)  -  Interval to re-check for LTE recovery

ntn_fb_tmr.description: NTN Fallback Timer (int, seconds)  -  Seconds without LTE before falling back to NTN

ntn_flgs.description: NTN Flags (128-bit hex bitmask)  -  Publish-control and mode flags for Non-Terrestrial Network. Click to edit.

ntn_ka_to.description: NTN Keep-Alive Timeout (int, seconds)  -  Keep-alive idle timeout

ntn_loc_val.description: NTN Location Validity (int, seconds)  -  Max GPS fix age before considered stale

ntn_udp_ip.description: NTN UDP Server IP (string)  -  UDP uplink server IP address

ntn_udp_port.description: NTN UDP Server Port (string)  -  UDP uplink server port number

ota_addr.description: OTA Server Address (string, max 64 chars)  -  OTA server hostname or IP

ota_cert.description: OTA Certificate Tag (string, max 64 chars)  -  TLS credential tag; use -1 to skip cert verification

ota_devid.description: OTA Device ID (string, max 64 chars)  -  Device ID used in firmware download path

ota_int.description: OTA Check Interval (int, seconds)  -  Seconds between OTA version checks

ota_pass.description: OTA Password (string, max 64 chars)  -  HTTP Basic Auth password for OTA

ota_port.description: OTA Server Port (int)  -  OTA server TCP port

ota_tls.description: OTA TLS (bool 0/1)  -  Enable TLS for OTA server connection

ota_user.description: OTA Username (string, max 64 chars)  -  HTTP Basic Auth username for OTA

pbkdf2.hash.description: PBKDF2 Hash  -  Stored password hash using PBKDF2 algorithm (read-only)

pbkdf2.salt.description: PBKDF2 Salt  -  Cryptographic salt for password-based key derivation (read-only)

pwr_st.description: Power State (bool 0/1)  -  Power management subsystem active

reserved_enable1.description: Reserved Enable 1  -  Reserved for future subsystem enable flags

reserved_enable2.description: Reserved Enable 2  -  Reserved for future subsystem enable flags

reserved_gnss_config1.description: Reserved GNSS Config 1  -  Reserved for future GNSS features

reserved_gnss_config2.description: Reserved GNSS Config 2  -  Reserved for future GNSS features

reserved_hardware_info.description: Reserved Hardware Info  -  Reserved for additional hardware identity data

reserved_modem_info.description: Reserved Modem Info (APN/PDN, string max 64 chars)  -  Packet Data Network / APN string

reserved_mqtt_config1.description: Reserved MQTT Config 1  -  Reserved for future MQTT features

reserved_mqtt_config2.description: Reserved MQTT Config 2  -  Reserved for future MQTT features

reserved_ota_config1.description: Reserved OTA Config 1  -  Reserved for future OTA features

reserved_ota_config2.description: Reserved OTA Config 2  -  Reserved for future OTA features

reserved_sensor_config1.description: Reserved Sensor Config 1  -  Reserved for future sensor features

reserved_sensor_config2.description: Reserved Sensor Config 2  -  Reserved for future sensor features

sens_accel_fs.description: Accelerometer Full Scale (int, g)  -  Full-scale range; default 8 g

sens_bmp_odr.description: Barometer ODR (int, Hz)  -  BMP390 output data rate; default 25 Hz

sens_cal.description: Sensor Calibration (bool 0/1)  -  Run sensor calibration routine on startup

sens_flt.description: Sensor Filter Window (int, samples)  -  Low-pass filter window size; default 8

sens_gyro_fs.description: Gyroscope Full Scale (int, deg/s)  -  Full-scale range; default 500 deg/s

sens_mag_odr.description: Magnetometer ODR (int, Hz)  -  IIS2MDC output data rate; default 50 Hz

sens_pub_interval.description: Sensor Publish Interval (int, ms)  -  MQTT publish interval for sensor data; default 30 ms

sens_rt.description: Sensor Sampling Rate (int, Hz)  -  IMU/baro/mag sampling frequency; default 100 Hz

sim_info.description: SIM Info (string: sim,esim)  -  Physical SIM and eSIM identifiers

sys_en.description: System Enable (uint16 bitmask)  -  Controls which subsystems are initialized at boot. Click to edit bits.

uas_num.description: UAS Number (string, max 32 chars)  -  UAS registration number

uas_status.description: UAS Status (string, max 64 chars)  -  Current operational status string

units.description: Units  -  Measurement unit system; default METRIC
